evals.prompt: Render the Mermaid diagrams in report.md to PNGs.
evals.expected_output: The agent runs --check first; if mmdc is on PATH, invokes render_mermaid.py with --input report.md and a default --output-dir, then surfaces the DIAGRAMS count and the rewritten Markdown path.
assertions: Agent invokes `python scripts/render_mermaid.py --input report.md` (flag order may vary)
Agent does not write its own mmdc invocation directly
Agent surfaces the rewritten Markdown path and the diagram count

evals.prompt: Render the diagrams in design.md and put them next to the file.
evals.expected_output: When --check exits 2 because mmdc is not installed, the agent stops and tells the user to run `npm install -g @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli` themselves. The agent does not attempt to install it automatically.
assertions: Agent stops after --check returns a non-zero exit indicating mmdc is missing
Agent tells the user to run `npm install -g @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli`
Agent does not invoke npm install via the Bash tool
Agent does not suggest a Mermaid Live Editor URL fallback

evals.prompt: Render the diagrams in arch.md to SVGs with the forest theme into ./out.
assertions: Agent does not also pass --background unless asked

evals.prompt: I'm going to publish report.md to Confluence — render the Mermaid blocks first so the publisher can attach the images.
evals.expected_output: The agent runs mermaid-renderer first, surfaces the rewritten Markdown and the list of PNG attachments, and notes that the next step is to invoke confluence-publisher with --attach for each image.
assertions: Agent surfaces the rewritten Markdown path and the image filenames
Agent explains the next step is confluence-publisher with --input <rewritten>.md --attach <each image>
Agent does not invoke confluence-publisher in this step (composition is the user's call)

evals.prompt: Bake the Mermaid diagram in diagram.md into a PNG.
evals.expected_output: The agent confirms mmdc (`render_mermaid.py --check`), then runs `python scripts/render_mermaid.py --input diagram.md --output-dir out`, which renders each fenced block to a PNG and writes a rewritten Markdown alongside, printing OUTPUT_DIR/REWRITTEN/DIAGRAMS. It reports the output directory.
assertions: Agent invokes render_mermaid.py on diagram.md (does not hand-draw or fabricate the image)
